liveVerification.detail: G1 LIVE GATE: PASS (final refined run): exactly 2 new assistant-chat rows BY ID on the owner ledger (tokens 1076+3183, in-window), visitor +0 any agentType; breakdown DELTA exactly this run's tokens (4259); tour playback + registry-only action dual-proven free (zero POSTs + zero rows both ledgers); owner's 6 in-window non-assistant rows printed + identified (pi-fast-loop x5, memory-extract x1 - own build/anonymisation, none mis-attributed); strict console; cleanup. Loop history: launcher failure #1 was the scaffold-mid-edit build collision (sequencing rule in the E2 RUN_LOG entry); #2 was the driver's own click-interception; the strict any-agentType interim assertion caught the owner's async build-billing and was refined to identity-exact + log-and-verify
